query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `birthdate_changes` (
  `id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `old_birth_date` VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT NULL,
  `new_birth_date` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  `changed_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `ip_address` VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_birthdate_changes_user` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

  `changed_at` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `ip_address` VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_birthdate_changes_user` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
